events.name: San Antonio Spurs at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — It's been more than half a century since the Knicks hung an NBA championship banner inside Madison Square Garden.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks win NBA Cup after rallying to beat Spurs 124-113

video.headline: Knicks surge late to win NBA Cup championship

highlights.headline: Knicks surge late to win NBA Cup championship
highlights.description: The Knicks pull away in the fourth quarter to defeat the Spurs and capture the third NBA Cup title.
